parameters.content:
## HINDSIGHT — cyber incident log pipeline
Drop a SIEM export, vuln scan, or phishing report (.pdf/.md) into **/data/incoming_docs**.
Gemini extracts → FastAPI re-scores severity & routes → Sheets + Gmail.

### Multimodal branch
If the doc embeds a Grafana/dashboard image, Gemini Vision reads the chart and the notes are folded into the main extraction. `onError: continue` so a vision miss never blocks the pipeline.

### Severity is computed, not trusted
The FastAPI service re-scores severity from a rubric (service tier × jurisdiction breadth × impact language). SEV1 → immediate page.

### Retry / rate-limit handling
Gemini nodes: retryOnFail, 5 tries, 3s backoff — survives 429s. Enrichment: 3 tries.
